🎓 Student Performance Predictor (Machine Learning)

📌 Project Overview

This project predicts student final exam performance (G3) using machine learning techniques.

The goal is to understand how lifestyle, study habits, and social factors influence academic performance.

🛠️ Technologies Used

Python
Pandas, NumPy
Matplotlib, Seaborn
Scikit-learn

🤖 Models Used

Linear Regression
Ridge Regression
Lasso Regression

Ridge Regression performed best.

📊 Key Insights

Past failures strongly reduce performance.

Students aiming for higher education score higher.

Study time positively impacts grades.

Lifestyle factors alone cannot perfectly predict marks.

📈 Model Performance

Model	R² Score
Linear Regression	0.14
Ridge Regression	0.14
Lasso Regression	0.02


🚀 Future Improvements

Include previous exam scores (G1 & G2)
Use advanced models (Random Forest, XGBoost)
